source: Manual OP15 post-ban meta scan: OP Leaderboard usage, OnePiece.gg tier list, Egman power rankings, PriceCharting spot checks
rules: Meta/raw board ignores PSA 10 comp gate. It ranks playability, usage spike, raw liquidity, bundle potential, and grading side-upside separately.

rows.name: Boa Hancock (Alternate Art)
rows.whyItMatters: Strong raw-to-PSA10 spread and Nate already found one around $78. Treat clean copies as grading candidates.
rows.mainRisk: Only works if the card is truly clean; do not chase damaged/edge-worn copies.

rows.name: Mamaragan
rows.whyItMatters: Core Purple Enel card with high usage. Buy playsets cheap and bundle with the rest of the engine.
rows.mainRisk: Not a grading card; profit depends on bundle pricing and demand staying hot.

rows.name: Borsalino
rows.whyItMatters: Top usage signal from the current meta read. Good liquidity candidate if bought below market.
rows.mainRisk: No PSA spread; only buy at a discount because this is raw liquidity, not grading ROI.

rows.name: Nami
rows.whyItMatters: Cheap raw entry with surprisingly strong PSA 10 comps. This is exactly the type the grading sniper used to miss because of prefilters.
rows.mainRisk: Small cards only make sense if copies are flawless and batched with other submissions.

rows.name: Monkey.D.Luffy (Alternate Art)
rows.whyItMatters: Character demand plus usable spread, but buy-in is high enough that discount matters.
rows.mainRisk: At full market the spread gets mediocre after grading/shipping/friction.

rows.name: Electrical Luna
rows.whyItMatters: High Enel usage and cheap enough to include in complete engine bundles.
rows.mainRisk: Single-card margins are tiny; needs playset/bundle sale.

rows.name: Lightning Dragon (Alternate Art)
rows.whyItMatters: Meta-relevant Enel card, but the alt-art graded market is still immature.
rows.mainRisk: Too thin for sniper grading rules; do not treat BGS/odd comps as clean PSA 10 liquidity.

rows.name: Enel (Alternate Art)
rows.whyItMatters: Tier 1 deck leader/theme demand, but graded comp depth is not mature enough for the grading board.
rows.mainRisk: New-set hype can fade; buy only under market.

rows.name: Nami
rows.angle: Meta relevant but grading spread too tight
rows.whyItMatters: Character/meta signal is real, but the PSA 10 spread is too thin after fees unless bought deeply under market.
rows.mainRisk: Easy to overpay because Nami name carries demand.
